message:
fix(runtime): CLIENT TRACKING/CACHING must return OK (3rd fix)

IMPORTANT: Redis returns OK for CLIENT TRACKING ON/OFF and CLIENT
CACHING YES/NO. Client libraries depend on this behavior. This was
reverted by concurrent agents twice — adding explicit comments to
prevent future regressions.

Conformance tests verify this: core_client_conformance expects
SimpleString("OK") for client_tracking_on/off and client_caching_yes/no.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
